claims_reviewed.claim: Donavan McKinney is a Michigan state representative serving the 11th House District.
claims_reviewed.notes: McKinney was originally elected to the 14th in 2022; after MICRC redistricting (approved March 27, 2024), he ran in and won the 11th in 2024. Currently representing 11th. Chip 'MI-11' and his caption 'I currently serve as a state representative in the 11th House District' are accurate as of speech date (April 25, 2026). Note: name spelling is Donavan (not Donovan) per official sources, but spelling validation is handled by mpc/roster.json.

summary: 1 claim reviewed: 1 supported, 0 uncertain. McKinney's current district (11th) is correct as of speech date. Cleared for render.
